title: Method and system for routing messages from a home network to a foreign network
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a system (108) and a method (600) for routing one or more messages from a home network (106) to a foreign network (110) The system (108) includes a receiving unit (212) to load a short code to long code map at an application on a server (104) in the foreign network (110) and the one or more messages from a User Equipment (UE) (102). The system (108) includes an identification unit (214) to identify a long code for the corresponding short code. The system (108) includes a conversion unit (216) to convert the short code to the identified long code upon identification of the long code. The system (108) includes a routing unit (218) to route the one or more messages to the application on the server (104) in the foreign network (110) utilizing the long code.
